extraction.one_line_summary: CALMEJANE Lilian soloed to victory from the breakaway after attacking decisively on the final climb, holding off KIŠERLOVSKI Robert by seconds despite severe cramping at 4km to go.
tactical_patterns: ROCHE Nicolas bridged from chase group to front break then attacked, fragmenting the breakaway before CALMEJANE's winning move.
Team Sky placed both HENAO Sergio and LANDA Mikel in break as GC protection, yet still controlled peloton tempo.
KWIATKOWSKI Michał carrying bottles caused THOMAS Geraint's corner crash, revealing Sky's logistical vulnerability on narrow technical sections.
ARU Fabio gained 9-point KOM advantage over stage winner by targeting Cat-1 Pli summit, prioritizing jersey over stage win.

rider_signals.CALMEJANE Lilian: positive: demonstrated exceptional mental resilience overcoming severe cramping at 4km out while holding 40-second gap
rider_signals.KIŠERLOVSKI Robert: positive: closed gap to 10-15 seconds on final climb despite being dropped by winning attack
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: positive: bridged from second chase group to front break then launched destabilizing attack before final climb
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: crashed off-road mid-stage but returned to perform substantial domestique work in finale
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: neutral: placed in break as GC rider but Sky still controlled peloton, revealing dual-approach tactic
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: placed in break alongside HENAO as GC insurance policy
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: won Cat-1 Pli for 10 points, strategically targeting polka dots over stage result
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: positive: finished in front chase group 50 seconds back, showing climbing form
rider_signals.BROWN Nathan: positive: placed well in chase group 50 seconds down, unexpected climbing performance
